/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/tte.h File Reference

Bare Metal Environment translation table entry (TTE) support. More...


Data Structures

struct  tte_t
 The full data translation table entry. More...

Defines

#define VPFN(va)   ((va) >> 12)
 Extract a virtual page frame number from a VA.
#define PFN_LO(pa)   (((pa) & 0xFFFFFFFF) >> 12)
 Extract low page frame number bits from a physical address.
#define PFN_HI(pa)   ((pa) >> 32)
 Extract high page frame number bits from a physical address.
#define TTE_PS_4K   0
 4K page size code
#define TTE_PS_16K   1
 16K page size code
#define TTE_PS_64K   2
 64K page size code
#define TTE_PS_256K   3
 256K page size code
#define TTE_PS_1M   4
 1M page size code
#define TTE_PS_4M   5
 4M page size code
#define TTE_PS_16M   6
 16M page size code
#define TTE_PG_SHIFT_4K   12
 4K page shift
#define TTE_PG_SHIFT_16K   14
 16K page shift
#define TTE_PG_SHIFT_64K   16
 64K page shift
#define TTE_PG_SHIFT_256K   18
 256K page shift
#define TTE_PG_SHIFT_1M   20
 1M page shift
#define TTE_PG_SHIFT_4M   22
 4M page shift
#define TTE_PG_SHIFT_16M   24
 16M page shift
#define TTE_SHIFT_TO_PS(x)   (((x) - 12) >> 1)
 Convert log2 of a page size to its page size code.
#define TTE_PS_TO_SHIFT(x)   (((x) << 1) + 12)
 Covert a page size code to log2 of the size of the page.

Detailed Description

Bare Metal Environment translation table entry (TTE) support.

A translation table entry is used in either the instruction or data TLB to translate virtual addresses to physical addresses.
